title: Many Russians in No Mood for Celebration on Kremlin’s Biggest Day of the Year
summary_full: As the country heads into Victory Day, the economy is stalling, internet restrictions are growing and the Kremlin is fearing Ukrainian attacks.
summary_public: As the country heads into Victory Day, the economy is stalling, internet restrictions are growing and the Kremlin is fearing Ukrainian attacks.
